channel.title: Awesome Mac - Recent App Additions
channel.description: Recently added macOS apps tracked from awesome-mac.

item.title: Aurora Editor
item.category: Reading and Writing Tools / Text Editors
item.description: Category: Reading and Writing Tools / Text Editors Description: Lightweight Code Editor (IDE) for macOS. Commit: Wire RSS feed into docs and CI Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/8c3415f481ab1f5e4fb3bdc71919448cfac1e5a7

item.title: Bootstrap Studio
item.category: Reading and Writing Tools / Text Editors
item.description: Category: Reading and Writing Tools / Text Editors Description: A powerful desktop app for creating responsive websites using the Bootstrap framework. Commit: Wire RSS feed into docs and CI Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/8c3415f481ab1f5e4fb3bdc71919448cfac1e5a7

item.title: Brackets
item.category: Reading and Writing Tools / Text Editors
item.description: Category: Reading and Writing Tools / Text Editors Description: A modern, open source text editor that understands web design. Commit: Wire RSS feed into docs and CI Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/8c3415f481ab1f5e4fb3bdc71919448cfac1e5a7

item.title: CodeEdit
item.category: Reading and Writing Tools / Text Editors
item.description: Category: Reading and Writing Tools / Text Editors Description: A lightweight, natively-built editor. Open source. Free forever. Commit: Wire RSS feed into docs and CI Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/8c3415f481ab1f5e4fb3bdc71919448cfac1e5a7

item.title: CotEditor
item.category: Reading and Writing Tools / Text Editors

item.title: Cursor
